summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Clinimetria Reumatologica. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed (patients CRUD, assessments CRUD, stats, cascade delete, 404 handling, _id exclusion). Frontend: Dashboard, Patients list, Patient detail, Nuova valutazione dropdown (all 10 indices listed), DAS28-ESR dialog opens, Homunculus renders 28 clickable joints, click cycles through states, TJC/SJC counters update (5/3 verified), score computes in real-time (1.74 displayed), save assessment works (toast 'Valutazione salvata'), history table updates, trend chart renders with 2 points.

issues: Uses browser-native date picker (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of shadcn Calendar component - US format may confuse Italian users expecting dd/mm/yyyy
React warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (a11y)

action_items: Add data-testid to ESR/VES input (e.g. input-esr) and GH slider (input-gh) in AssessmentForm for easier testing
Add data-testid to patient dialog form fields (input-nome, input-cognome, input-data-nascita, select-sesso, input-codice-fiscale, input-diagnosi, textarea-note)
Consider replacing browser-native date input with shadcn Calendar + Italian locale (dd/mm/yyyy)
Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to fix a11y warning
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is concise (185 lines) and follows good practices: UUID IDs, _id excluded via projection, async motor, Pydantic validation, proper 404/400 codes.
Cascade delete is correctly implemented for patient->assessments.
CORS allow_origins from env (good) but fallback '*' with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid in browsers - consider requiring explicit origins in production.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed patients/assessments and clean up; one test leaves 'TEST_Cascade' deleted. Existing 'Rossi Mario' patient from prior manual testing was reused and now has 2 assessments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully tested via /app/backend/tests/test_clinimetria_api.py (pytest). Frontend critical path verified: patient creation dialog opens correctly, homunculus 28 joints with data-testid='joint-{key}' work, DAS28 score computes. ESR/GH inputs lack data-testid so could not be filled via script - score 1.74 was computed from joints only. Export PDF/CSV buttons exist (visible in 'Esporta' dropdown) but download trigger not verified. Minor enhancements needed: add data-testid on remaining form inputs.
